inputs_used.brand_overview: Online platform bridging beauty professionals and customers with home services, bookings, workshops, and corporate events in Dubai. | Unleash Your Beauty, Anywhere, Anytime | Online booking platform with detailed service catalog | Email contact at info@example-brand.co for custom bookings

competitors.name: Pristeena
competitors.what_they_do: Mobile beauty: makeup, hair, lashes, brows at Dubai homes
competitors.positioning: Flawless bridal/party transformations delivered to your door
competitors.why_competitor: Direct rival in home makeup/hairstyling for Dubai
competitors.ad_strategy_summary: Google/IG ads on mobile bridal services, party glam; Dubai home delivery angles

competitors.name: Biji Beauty Ladies Salon
competitors.what_they_do: Home salon: hair, makeup, nails, waxing, massages in Dubai
competitors.positioning: 24/7 premium beauty services at your Dubai doorstep
competitors.ad_strategy_summary: Instagram/TikTok ads on 24/7 convenience, full makeovers; Dubai luxury home service

competitors.name: Zieda Beauty Lounge
competitors.what_they_do: Home beauty: haircuts, styling, nails, makeup, lashes in Dubai
competitors.positioning: Luxurious salon treatments without leaving home in Dubai
competitors.why_competitor: Matches home hair/nails/makeup services for locals
competitors.ad_strategy_summary: Facebook ads on hassle-free home luxury, nail/hair services; Dubai convenience

competitors.name: Kzee Home Salon
competitors.what_they_do: Home hair services: blow-drys, cuts, coloring, keratin, botox in Dubai
competitors.positioning: Specialized hair revitalization treatments delivered to your Dubai home
competitors.why_competitor: Direct rival in home hair styling & treatments for Dubai beauty seekers
competitors.ad_strategy_summary: Ads on 'hair home service Dubai'; promotes specialized treatments, revitalization angles on search platforms

competitors.name: Mauve Beauty Salon
competitors.what_they_do: Home salon: haircuts, facials, beauty services avoiding salon crowds in Dubai
competitors.positioning: Professional crowd-free beauty services from hair to facials at your Dubai home
competitors.why_competitor: Competes on home hair/facials for convenience-focused Dubai customers
competitors.ad_strategy_summary: Likely Google ads on 'home salon Dubai'; angles: no crowds, professional hair/facials at home comfort

market_overview.market_insight: Concierge models dominate events/bridal, while ladies-only salons win daily privacy needs in Dubai homes.
market_overview.ad_landscape_note: Expect heavy Instagram/Facebook ads from independents pushing home convenience, bridal glam, hygiene; platforms like Urban avoided by direct providers

notable_changes: New: mauve beauty salon, kzee home salon
